subject: News. Schedules
body:
Hi Jeff
I'm putting myself into it seriously. 
Biography, if it's a good one can be used for more than one purpose. 
Plan to be in NY June 25-30. 
Will be glad to discuss then all issues: business. Politics. Biography. More. 
Will be in SP before with Sergey. Any recommendations?
Hope U R well. 
Best
EB

Ehud Barak, former prime minister of Israel, has book deal:
http://ap.worldnow.com/story/29208474/ehud-barak-former-prime-minister-of-israel-has-book-deal

Sent from my iPhone
